series_metadata.series_title: OMBUDSMAN Registry Data Collection Form ODA 1201
series_metadata.series_description: Hard copies of information about all representatives of the Office of the State Long-Term Care Ombudsman maintained in the Ombudsman Registry in accordance with Ohio Administrative Code 173-14-11.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: One year, then destroy. ; Electronic: One year, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
